info.name: nest-forge API - Complete Current Endpoints
info.description: Generated from NestJS controllers and DTOs. Uses /api/v1 for versioned routes and /api/health for health. Login requests capture tokens into collection variables.

exec: pm.test('response is JSON when body is present', function () { if (pm.response.text()) { pm.response.to.be.json; } });

pm.test('standard envelope when successful', function () { if (pm.response.code >= 200 && pm.response.code < 300 && pm.response.text()) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); } });
